case_title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. RONALD BUTERA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-07-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RONALD BUTERA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS; WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS -- JURY FEES. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. MINI MINUTES: Line # 9
Judge Pro Tem: Neil Bardack, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dipak Gandhi is present.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ronald Butera is present.
Attorney Michael Shenker appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of November 13, 2018 is vacated. (501)
